payload.topic: Social Media Strategy - X Twitter YouTube TikTok Instagram Playbooks
payload.target_audience: B2B SaaS founders, marketers, and entrepreneurs across social platforms
payload.prompt_override: Create a COMPREHENSIVE social media strategy for AgenticMarketingPro covering ALL major platforms. Include: 1) X/Twitter playbook (3-5 posts/day, thread strategy, engagement tactics), 2) YouTube playbook (weekly 8-15 min videos, SEO optimization, thumbnail strategy), 3) TikTok playbook (1x daily short-form, trend-jacking, educational content), 4) Instagram playbook (carousels + Reels, Stories strategy), 5) Content repurposing engine (1 asset → 5 formats), 6) Platform-specific content calendars, 7) Growth hacking tactics per platform, 8) Analytics and KPI tracking. Context: Every piece of content gets repurposed across 5 formats. Founder-led with team support.
